if t then local O=t(true)local D=u(O)D[W(523662-548416)],D[W(-890324+865370)],D[W(465278+-490322)]=m,i,function()return-3386436-(-765288)end return O else return k({},{[W(114852-139806)]=i,[W(-608573-(-583819))]=m;[W(-393438+368394)]=function()return 13368+-2634516 end})end end,function(m,W)local D=X(W)local t=function(t,k,u)return O(m,{t,k;u},W,D)end return t end,function(m)local W,O=-935647-(-935648),m[-133640-(-133641)]while O do x[O],W=x[O]-(538829-538828),(-91888-(-91889))+W if x[O]==-720330-(-720330)then x[O],y[O]=nil,nil end O=m[W]end end,function(m,W)local D=X(W)local t=function()return O(m,{},W,D)end return t end,function(m,W)local D=X(W)local t=function(t,k,u,M)return O(m,{t,k,u;M},W,D)end return t end,function(m,W)local D=X(W)local t=function(t)return O(m,{t},W,D)end return t end,{}return(g(505487-425323,{}))(D(H))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[W(-685335+660436)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
